spec.name: At The End Of The Trail Through The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a dusty trail leading through the deep, dark forest. Ancient grey trees loom all around you. A small trail leads northwards and the only other exit is east, along the main trail.

north.description: A narrow trail leads northwards through the underbrush.

east.description: The dusty trail leads east through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The ancient grey giants seem to observe you silently.
